atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports insomnia and lingering right knee issues.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports adjusting to the fall season.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing persistent lack of sleep.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports medication adjustments have exacerbated the lack of sleep.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports trying melatonin, meditation, and stretching with limited success.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no recent broken bones related to osteoporosis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient continues to see his neurologist for his multiple sclerosis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes prescribed medications for his multiple sclerosis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient previously experienced weakness in his right leg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the weakness in his right leg has improved.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports lingering issues from his knee surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some lower extremity weakness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports arthritic changes in his right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes fosamax for osteoporosis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a refill of fosamax 1 tablet per week, 11 refills.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs to continue encouraging regular neurology visits.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs to adhere to prescribed medications for multiple sclerosis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up in four weeks.
